name: Cider Caramels
instructions: In medium pot on medium heat, reduce apple cider by half
Add butter and stir until melted
Heat to 123C and add heavy cream
Heat back to 123C and pour into a sheet tray lined with parchment paper. Caramel thickness should be thickness of sheet tray.
Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top so every caramel piece will have some
Let it cool at room temperature
Store into quarts, label, date, refrigerate or freeze
directions: If cutting the caramels the day after, cover the sheet tray with plastic wrap
